verification.command: Select-String -Path static/api.js -Pattern 'async exportExcel\\(', 'async backupData\\(', 'axios.get\\(url, \\{ responseType: ''blob'' \\}\\)', 'axios.get\\(''/api/backup'', \\{ responseType: ''blob'' \\}\\)'

notes: Excel export now requests the backend as a blob, derives the filename from Content-Disposition, and triggers a controlled browser download instead of opening a new localhost tab.
Local backup download was moved onto the same controlled download path to prevent the same desktop-shell redirect behavior from surfacing elsewhere.
Operations-center capability was moved into a dedicated primary navigation view, while system settings copy now limits itself to configuration responsibilities.
The top card inside the operations panel now explains the page as an operator workflow instead of an internal acceptance checklist.
